001package net.okocraft.box.api.transaction;
002
003import net.okocraft.box.api.BoxProvider;
004import net.okocraft.box.api.model.item.BoxItem;
005import org.bukkit.entity.Player;
006import org.bukkit.inventory.Inventory;
007import org.bukkit.inventory.ItemStack;
008import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
009
010import java.util.ArrayList;
011import java.util.Objects;
012
013import static net.okocraft.box.api.transaction.TransactionResultType.DEPOSITED;
014import static net.okocraft.box.api.transaction.TransactionResultType.IS_AIR;
015import static net.okocraft.box.api.transaction.TransactionResultType.ITEM_NOT_REGISTERED;
016import static net.okocraft.box.api.transaction.TransactionResultType.NOT_DEPOSITED;
017import static net.okocraft.box.api.transaction.TransactionResultType.NOT_FOUND;
018import static net.okocraft.box.api.transaction.TransactionResultType.WITHDREW;
019
020/**
021 * A class for transacting with inventory. (ALPHA VERSION)
022 */
023public final class InventoryTransaction {
024
025    /**
026     * Deposits items in player's main hand.
027     *
028     * @param player       the target player
029     * @param depositLimit the deposit limit
030     * @return the {@link TransactionResult}
031     */
032    public static @NotNull TransactionResult depositItemInMainHand(@NotNull Player player, int depositLimit) {
033        Objects.requireNonNull(player);
034
035        if (depositLimit < 1) {
036            return TransactionResult.create(NOT_DEPOSITED);
037        }
038
039        var mainHand = player.getInventory().getItemInMainHand();
040
041        if (mainHand.getType().isAir()) {
042            return TransactionResult.create(IS_AIR);
043        }
044
045        var boxItem = BoxProvider.get().getItemManager().getBoxItem(mainHand);
046
047        if (boxItem.isEmpty()) {
048            return TransactionResult.create(ITEM_NOT_REGISTERED);
049        }
050
051        int depositAmount = Math.min(depositLimit, mainHand.getAmount());
052        int afterAmount = mainHand.getAmount() - depositAmount;
053
054        if (0 < afterAmount) {
055            mainHand.setAmount(afterAmount);
056            player.getInventory().setItemInMainHand(mainHand);
057        } else {
058            player.getInventory().setItemInMainHand(null);
059        }
060
061        return TransactionResult.create(DEPOSITED, boxItem.get(), depositAmount);
062    }
063
064    /**
065     * Deposits items in an inventory.
066     *
067     * @param inventory the target inventory
068     * @return the {@link TransactionResultList}
069     */
070    public static @NotNull TransactionResultList depositItemsInInventory(@NotNull Inventory inventory) {
071        Objects.requireNonNull(inventory);
072
073        var result = new ArrayList<TransactionResult>();
074        var contents = inventory.getStorageContents();
075
076        for (int i = 0; i < contents.length; i++) {
077            ItemStack item = contents[i];
078
079            if (item == null) {
080                continue;
081            }
082
083            var boxItem = BoxProvider.get().getItemManager().getBoxItem(item);
084
085            if (boxItem.isPresent()) {
086                result.add(TransactionResult.create(DEPOSITED, boxItem.get(), item.getAmount()));
087                contents[i] = null;
088            }
089        }
090
091        if (result.isEmpty()) {
092            return TransactionResultList.create(NOT_FOUND);
093        } else {
094            inventory.setStorageContents(contents);
095            return TransactionResultList.create(DEPOSITED, result);
096        }
097    }
098
099    /**
100     * Deposits specified items in an inventory.
101     *
102     * @param inventory    the target inventory
103     * @param boxItem      the item to deposit
104     * @param depositLimit the deposit limit
105     * @return the {@link TransactionResultList}
106     */
107    public static @NotNull TransactionResultList depositItem(@NotNull Inventory inventory,
108                                                             @NotNull BoxItem boxItem, int depositLimit) {
109        Objects.requireNonNull(inventory);
110        Objects.requireNonNull(boxItem);
111
112        if (depositLimit < 1) {
113            return TransactionResultList.create(NOT_DEPOSITED);
114        }
115
116        var result = new ArrayList<TransactionResult>();
117        var contents = inventory.getStorageContents();
118
119        int deposited = 0;
120
121        for (int i = 0; i < contents.length; i++) {
122            var item = contents[i];
123
124            if (item == null || !item.isSimilar(boxItem.getOriginal())) {
125                continue;
126            }
127
128            var temp = deposited + item.getAmount();
129
130            if (temp < depositLimit) {
131                deposited = temp;
132
133                result.add(TransactionResult.create(DEPOSITED, boxItem, item.getAmount()));
134                contents[i] = null;
135            } else {
136                int toDeposit = depositLimit - deposited;
137
138                result.add(TransactionResult.create(DEPOSITED, boxItem, toDeposit));
139
140                var after = item.getAmount() - toDeposit;
141
142                if (0 < after) {
143                    item.setAmount(after);
144                } else {
145                    contents[i] = null;
146                }
147
148                break;
149            }
150        }
151
152        if (result.isEmpty()) {
153            return TransactionResultList.create(NOT_FOUND);
154        } else {
155            inventory.setStorageContents(contents);
156            return TransactionResultList.create(DEPOSITED, result);
157        }
158    }
159
160    /**
161     * Withdraws items to an inventory.
162     *
163     * @param inventory the target inventory
164     * @param boxItem   the item to withdraw
165     * @param amount    the amount of item
166     * @return the {@link TransactionResult}
167     */
168    public static @NotNull TransactionResult withdraw(@NotNull Inventory inventory,
169                                                      @NotNull BoxItem boxItem, int amount) {
170        Objects.requireNonNull(inventory);
171        Objects.requireNonNull(boxItem);
172
173        var toStore = amount;
174        var maxStackSize = boxItem.getOriginal().getMaxStackSize();
175
176        var contents = inventory.getStorageContents();
177
178        for (int i = 0; i < contents.length && 0 < toStore; i++) {
179            var item = contents[i];
180
181            if (item != null && item.getType() != boxItem.getOriginal().getType()) {
182                continue;
183            }
184
185            if (item == null) {
186                var cloned = boxItem.getClonedItem();
187
188                if (toStore < maxStackSize) {
189                    cloned.setAmount(toStore);
190                    toStore = 0;
191                } else {
192                    cloned.setAmount(maxStackSize);
193                    toStore -= maxStackSize;
194                }
195
196                contents[i] = cloned;
197                continue;
198            }
199
200            if (item.isSimilar(boxItem.getOriginal())) {
201                var remaining = maxStackSize - item.getAmount();
202
203                if (remaining != 0) {
204                    if (toStore < remaining) {
205                        item.setAmount(item.getAmount() + toStore);
206                        toStore = 0;
207                    } else {
208                        item.setAmount(maxStackSize);
209                        toStore -= remaining;
210                    }
211                }
212            }
213        }
214
215        inventory.setStorageContents(contents);
216
217        if (toStore == 0) {
218            return TransactionResult.create(WITHDREW, boxItem, amount);
219        }
220
221        if (toStore == amount) {
222            return TransactionResult.create(TransactionResultType.INVENTORY_IS_FULL);
223        } else {
224            return TransactionResult.create(TransactionResultType.WITHDREW_PARTIAL, boxItem, amount - toStore);
225        }
226    }
227}
